children.heading: Agency
children.label: 1 Agency
children.text: The term “agency” has the meaning given the term in .section 3502 of title 44

children.label: A
children.text: has the meaning given the term in ;section 12 of title 15

children.label: B
children.text: includes to the extent that applies to unfair methods of competition; andsection 45 of title 15section 45 of title 15

children.label: C
children.text: includes any State antitrust law, but only to the extent that such law is consistent with the law referred to in subparagraph (A) or the law referred to in subparagraph (B).

children.label: A
children.text: The Department of Commerce.

children.label: B
children.text: The Department of Defense.

children.label: C
children.text: The Department of Energy.

children.label: D
children.text: The Department of Homeland Security.

children.label: E
children.text: The Department of Justice.

children.label: F
children.text: The Department of the Treasury.

children.label: G
children.text: The Office of the Director of National Intelligence.

children.heading: Cybersecurity purpose
children.label: 4 Cybersecurity purpose
children.text: The term “cybersecurity purpose” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Cybersecurity threat
children.label: 5 Cybersecurity threat
children.text: The term “cybersecurity threat” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Cyber threat indicator
children.label: 6 Cyber threat indicator
children.text: The term “cyber threat indicator” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Defensive measure
children.label: 7 Defensive measure
children.text: The term “defensive measure” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Federal entity
children.label: 8 Federal entity
children.text: The term “Federal entity” means a department or agency of the United States or any component of such department or agency.

children.heading: Information system
children.label: 9 Information system
children.text: The term “information system” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Local government
children.label: 10 Local government
children.text: The term “local government” means any borough, city, county, parish, town, township, village, or other political subdivision of a State.

children.heading: Malicious cyber command and control
children.label: 11 Malicious cyber command and control
children.text: The term “malicious cyber command and control” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Malicious reconnaissance
children.label: 12 Malicious reconnaissance
children.text: The term “malicious reconnaissance” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Monitor
children.label: 13 Monitor
children.text: The term “monitor” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this paragraph, the term “non-Federal entity” means any private entity, non-Federal government agency or department, or State, tribal, or local government (including a political subdivision, department, or component thereof).

children.heading: Inclusions
children.label: B Inclusions
children.text: The term “non-Federal entity” includes a government agency or department of the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the United States Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, the Northern Mariana Islands, and any other territory or possession of the United States.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: C Exclusion
children.text: The term “non-Federal entity” does not include a foreign power as defined in .section 1801 of title 50

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this paragraph, the term “private entity” means any person or private group, organization, proprietorship, partnership, trust, cooperative, corporation, or other commercial or nonprofit entity, including an officer, employee, or agent thereof.

children.heading: Inclusion
children.label: B Inclusion
children.text: The term “private entity” includes a State, tribal, or local government performing utility services, such as electric, natural gas, or water services.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: C Exclusion
children.text: The term “private entity” does not include a foreign power as defined in .section 1801 of title 50

children.heading: Security control
children.label: 16 Security control
children.text: The term “security control” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Security vulnerability
children.label: 17 Security vulnerability
children.text: The term “security vulnerability” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Tribal
children.label: 18 Tribal
children.text: The term “tribal” has the meaning given the term “Indian tribe” in .section 5304 of title 25
